title: clusiaceae
intro: The Clusiaceae rank refers to a family of flowering plants, commonly known as the Guttiferae or Clusia family. This family consists of approximately 1,300 species, which are primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions around the world. The plants within this family are often characterized by their glossy leaves, showy flowers, and distinctive secretory cavities that contain a yellow or orange latex. Clusiaceae includes a variety of trees, shrubs, and vines, many of which are valued for their ornamental and medicinal properties.
